JUDGE GEORGE COOPPELAS, RPTR. M. BRADY, CLK. R. CONTRERAS RONALD M. ARLAS APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF DAVID DAWSON APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT 10 AM CAUSE CALENDARED FOR JURY TRIAL. SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS IN CHAMBERS. PLTF. PER DIEM RECEIPT #1B29P106 FOR $360.00 DATED 11-29-94. CASE SETTLED: ALL PRESENT. PLTF. WAIVES BACK RENT FROM 10/1/94 TO 3/1/95. DEFT. PAY $5,000.00 TOTAL. $2,500.00 TO DEFT. WHEN HE SIGNS STIPULATION--BALANCE WHEN DEFT. TURNS IN KEY. DEFT. TO VACATE ON 3-1-95 BY 5PM. PLTF. CAN HAVE WRIT ISSUED AND SET FOR 3/2/95. DEFT. TO CANCEL RENT BOARD HEARING OR HEARING OF ANY OTHER GOVT. AGENCY. ANY HABITABILITY PROBLEM TO BE FIXED. EACH SIDE RELEASES TO OTHER OF ANY OTHER LIABILITIES. DEFT. ABANDONS ANY PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND. DEFT. WAIVES ANY EXTENSION OF EVICTION. DEFT. NOT NOT TO BOTHER OTHEER TENANTS. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY. FEES. DEFT. LEAVE CLEAN. PLTF. WILL DISMISS. DEFT. WAIVE SECURITY DEPOSIT. NO OTHER OCCUPANTS.
